behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names src/prime_rl/trainer/model.py, get_model(), debug.num_layers, num_hidden_layers, text_config — all referenced in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (VLM configs nest under text_config) but doesn't prescribe the specific getattr/target_config fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use AST to extract the if-block and check behavior (final num_hidden_layers values and warning content); alternative fixes like hasattr checks or if/else branches would still pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the extracted code block via exec() and assert on resulting state and logger warnings.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific values (4, 6, 8 clamped) and skipped-layer counts (28, 12, 14) — a stub can't satisfy multiple parametrized cases.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover VLM handling, backward compat for non-VLM, min clamping, and warning message correctness as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Anti-stub) and descriptive names.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions 'around line 250' as a locator hint but the file/function localization is appropriate for this bug-fix task.
